ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonality" (
  "seasonality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonality type */,
  "seasonality_code" TEXT /* Code for the seasonality type (e.g., nsa for non-seasonally adjusted) */,
  "seasonality_description" TEXT /* Description of the seasonality type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "seasonality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seasonality type */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "unemployment_count" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed individuals */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  "labor_force" INTEGER /* Total labor force */,
  "employed" INTEGER /* Number of employed individuals */,
  "unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_data_seasonality_id FOREIGN KEY ("seasonality_id") REFERENCES seasonality ("seasonality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotation" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES unemployment_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES unemployment_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES unemployment_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "quality_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES unemployment_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the data was validated */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES unemployment_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data (e.g., image, interactive visualization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)
